mapper.insert: insert into member (login_id, password, nickname, email, role, status, report_count, created_date, profile_img, login_type, provider, provider_id,name) values (#{login_id}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{role}, #{status}, 0, sysdate(), #{filename}, #{login_type}, #{provider}, #{provider_id}, #{name})
mapper.update: update member set password = #{password} where member_id = #{member_id}
update member set nickname = #{nickname}, email = #{email}, status = #{status}, profile_img = #{filename}, name = #{name}, member_intro = #{member_intro} where member_id = #{member_id}

update member set login_id = #{login_id}, password = #{password}, status =#{status}, nickname = #{nickname}, email=#{email}, profile_img = #{profile_img}, name = #{name}, member_intro = #{member_intro} where member_id = #{member_id}
mapper.select: select m.member_id, m.profile_img, m.name, m.nickname, m.login_id, m.email, m.role, m.member_intro, m.report_count, m.status, m.created_date, m.provider, ( select count(*) from recipe r where r.member_id = m.member_id) AS recipe_count, ( select count(*) from `comment` c where c.member_id = m.member_id) AS comment_count, ( select count(*) from bookmark b where b.member_id = m.member_id) AS bookmark_count, ( select coalesce(sum(r.like_count),0) from recipe r where r.member_id = m.member_id) AS like_count from member m where m.member_id = #{member_id}
